meta-description: Learn about rehabilitative and rehabilitation services by reviewing the definition in the HealthCare.gov Glossary.
title: Rehabilitative/Rehabilitation services
excerpt: Health care services that help you keep, get back, or improve skills and functioning for daily living that have been lost or impaired because you were sick, hurt, or disabled. These services may include physical and occupational therapy, speech-language pathology, and psychiatric rehabilitation services in a variety of inpatient and/or outpatient settings.
